name: Interra Resources Limited
summary: Interra Resources Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the petroleum exploration and production activities in Indonesia and Myanmar. It also holds 60% interests in two onshore producing oil fields in the Chauk and Yenangyaung covering an area of approximately 1800 square kilometers located on the north of Yangon; and a 67.5% interest in the Kuala Pambuang block covering an area of approximately 1,631 square kilometers located to the southwest of Palangkaraya. The company trades in heavy machineries. Interra Resources Limited was incorporated in 1973 and is based in Singapore.
